mapper.select: SELECT CC.CHAPTER_ID, CC.COURSE_ID, CC.CHAPTER_TITLE, CC.CHAPTER_ORDER, CC.VIDEO_URL, CC.VIDEO_PATH, CC.ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME, CC.FILE_SIZE, CC.DURATION_SECONDS, CC.SUMMARY_TEXT, CC.TRANSCRIPT_TEXT, CC.AI_GENERATED_YN, CC.QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS, CC.USE_YN, CC.CREATED_AT, CC.UPDATED_AT FROM COURSE_CHAPTER CC WHERE CC.CHAPTER_ID = #{chapterId} AND CC.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CC.CHAPTER_ID, CC.COURSE_ID, CC.CHAPTER_TITLE, CC.CHAPTER_ORDER, CC.VIDEO_URL, CC.VIDEO_PATH, CC.ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME, CC.FILE_SIZE, CC.DURATION_SECONDS, CC.SUMMARY_TEXT, CC.TRANSCRIPT_TEXT, CC.AI_GENERATED_YN, CC.QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS, CC.USE_YN, CC.CREATED_AT, CC.UPDATED_AT FROM COURSE_CHAPTER CC JOIN COURSE C ON CC.COURSE_ID = C.COURSE_ID WHERE CC.USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.COURSE_TYPE = 'ONLINE' AND CC.QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS = 'PENDING' AND TRIM(CC.VIDEO_PATH) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(CC.ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME) IS NOT NULL AND CC.FILE_SIZE IS NOT NULL AND CC.FILE_SIZE > 0 ORDER BY CC.CHAPTER_ID ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE COURSE_CHAPTER SET TRANSCRIPT_TEXT = #{transcriptText}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CHAPTER_ID = #{chapterId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

UPDATE COURSE_CHAPTER SET QUIZ_BUILD_STATUS = #{quizBuildStatus}, AI_GENERATED_YN = CASE WHEN #{quizBuildStatus} = 'COMPLETED' THEN 'Y' WHEN #{quizBuildStatus} = 'FAILED' THEN 'N' ELSE AI_GENERATED_YN END, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE CHAPTER_ID = #{chapterId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
